are_you_ok.title: 1.6 million eggs recalled at Kroger and other stores over salmonella risk, FDA says
are_you_ok.summary: Systemic food recall affecting six states including likely local grocery buyers; check-in worthy.
are_you_ok.description: The recall affects white-shell and cage-free eggs sold under multiple grocery brands in six states. No illnesses have been reported.

conversation_starters.title: More storms target Colorado Thursday with heavy rain and flash flood threat before weekend heat retu
conversation_starters.summary: Local storm/flash flood forecast, good opener. You could open with: 'Did you see the flash flood warnings for tonight before the heat comes back?'

conversation_starters.title: I-70 back open in western Colorado after large mudslides prompted closure
conversation_starters.summary: Major highway closure/reopening due to mudslides, notable local infrastructure event. You could open with: 'Did you hear I-70 finally reopened after that mudslide near Silt?'
conversation_starters.description: The highway had been fully closed since Monday evening between Silt and New Castle due to mud and debris covering the lanes.

conversation_starters.title: Castle Rock implements Stage 2 drought restrictions as Colorado residents fear for their plants
conversation_starters.summary: Local drought restriction affecting residents. You could open with: 'Did you hear Castle Rock just went to Stage 2 water restrictions?'
conversation_starters.description: The Town of Castle Rock has implemented Stage 2 drought restrictions in response to sustained high water demand and low water supply.

you_should_know.title: Licenses suspended at Denver nightclub where 9 people shot
you_should_know.summary: Mass shooting (9 shot) at a Denver nightclub with city licensing action — high-impact, widely-known local event. Outcome (license suspension/closure). You should know.
you_should_know.description: Denver Department of Licensing and Consumer Protection documents allege multiple instances of violence and licensing issues at the Ultra Lounge East nightclub.

you_should_know.title: Family briefly returns to Bishop Castle before new mandatory wildfire evacuations
you_should_know.summary: Active wildfire forcing mandatory evacuations near a well-known CO landmark. Point hazard in-region; awareness-worthy. You should know.
you_should_know.description: The Bishop family was able to briefly return to Bishop Castle on Monday, before new mandatory evacuations went into effect. The castle remains closed.

you_should_know.title: Fort Collins pays $500K after officer arrested sober driver for DUI
you_should_know.summary: $500K payout over wrongful DUI arrests by a CO officer — police accountability outcome, notable statewide. You should know.
you_should_know.description: An internal investigation found in at least nine instances, no alcohol or drugs were found in blood tests for people then-Officer Jason Haferman arrested for DUI.
